statement: In every magma, Equation 3767 (`x * y = (y * y) * (z * w)`) implies Equation 4245 (`x * y = ((z * w) * x) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0077
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op y y) (op z w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op (op z w) x) w)
